title: Ensure Docs Checkout Paths Are Portable
forbids: absolute local checkout paths that carry a docs/...md suffix
why: Docs should survive checkout moves, worktree renames, user-home differences, and thread handoffs; this check detects host-local prefixes on otherwise durable docs references.
remediate: Use repo-relative docs paths so the reference survives checkout moves, worktree renames, and different user-home layouts.
message: Replace local absolute docs paths with durable repo-relative docs paths.
